title: Why did MrBeast ask KSI about his forehead ad price after Will Baron’s viral billboard stunt?
summary_full: YouTuber Jimmy “MrBeast” Donaldson surprised fans after offering to buy all the advertising space on creator Will Baron’s forehead. Baron started the idea after joking about his large forehead and priced ads between $300 and $600 weekly. MrBeast later asked KSI about forehead ad prices too, and KSI replied with a playful boxing challenge.
